---
title: "The Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness"
---

## The Rt. Rev. John Fielder Mackarness

**Dates:** (1820-1889)

### Description

Bishop of Oxford

### Biography

He became Rector of Honiton in 1855 and was consecrated Bishop of Oxford on 25 January 1870. He married (7 Aug 1849) Alethea Buchanan Coleridge (1826-1909)  who survived him with 3 sons and 4 daus.

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from July 23, 1873
- Letter from [check 1872]
- Letter from February 16th, 1871.
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from October 8, 1869.
- Letter from Nov 3d 1860
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
